title: UltraGrime Multi Purpose Family XXL Biodegradable 80 Clothwipes - Pomelo Scented Large Wet Cloths - Heavy Duty Multi Purpose Cleaner
features: CLEAN UP EVERYDAY MESSES - Tackle spills, food, paint, mud and more on all surfaces with our tough, safe and biodegradable heavy duty wipes. Our XXL cloth wipes are 38cm x 25cm – double the size of common wipes!
STAYS WET FOR OVER 60 MINUTES - Unlike other wipes that dry out in 5-10 minutes, UltraGrime's wet wipes stay wet and usable for over 60 minutes. This means less waste and more convenience for you!

GET THE JOB DONE WITH JUST ONE WIPE - These powerful but safe wipes can take care of any mess on all surfaces, including floors, walls, toys, and furniture. No need for multiple wipes or harsh chemicals-- UltraGrime is made to clean quickly and effectively.
VITAMIN E & ALOE VERA - Keep your skin healthy while you clean! Our wipes are packed with ALOE VERA and VITAMIN E to help Keep your skin healthy. No need FOR harsh chemicals or bleach.

LUXURY POMELO SCENT - Get a fresh start to your day with our luxurious Pomelo scent. Leave your surfaces clean and smelling great with UltraGrime heavy duty wipes. Plus, cleaning wipes are packed in recyclable packaging, which is great for those who want to help protect the environment!
description: Product Description When life gets messy, UltraGrime Life: Family wipes deliver professional grade cleaning in the home environment. Clean up everyday mess on all surfaces including floors, walls, toys & furniture and leave the room smelling great with a Luxury Pomelo scent. Ingredients Cleaning Wipes
